meta.title: Cloudzy.AI — Your One-Stop Cloud Platform
meta.description: Enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure solutions. Public Cloud, Private Cloud, DevOps as a Service, Data Center Services, and MLOps — all under one roof.

hero.title: Your One-Stop Cloud Platform
hero.subtitle: Focus on growing your business while we handle the technical complexity. Customizable, cost-effective cloud solutions with a seamless experience.

services.heading: Discover the Power of Our Cloud Platform
services.subtitle: How Cloudzy.AI helps you scale, deploy, and innovate faster.

public_cloud.title: Public Cloud
public_cloud.description: Scalable virtual infrastructure on demand. Deploy workloads globally with enterprise-grade reliability and pay only for what you use.

private_cloud.title: Private Cloud
private_cloud.description: Dedicated cloud environments built for compliance and performance. Full control over your infrastructure with zero noisy neighbors.

devops.title: DevOps as a Service
devops.description: Accelerate delivery with our expert DevOps team. CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and automated workflows — handled for you.

datacenter.title: Data Center Services
datacenter.description: Colocation and managed hosting across 13 global locations. Low-latency connectivity with 99.99% uptime guarantee.

mlops.title: MLOps
mlops.description: End-to-end machine learning operations. From model training to production deployment, we streamline your AI/ML pipeline.

process.heading: How Does Cloudzy.AI Work?
process.subtitle: A streamlined 5-step methodology to get you from idea to execution.

steps.title: Define Your Needs
steps.description: Submit your requirements through our online form. Tell us about your workloads, scale, and goals.

steps.title: Meet Our Architects
steps.description: Our Solution Architect team reviews your needs and designs a tailored infrastructure blueprint.

steps.title: Contract Agreement
steps.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. We finalize terms that work for both sides.

steps.title: Dedicated Team
steps.description: A specialized team is assigned to your project — engineers, support, and a dedicated account manager.

steps.title: Execution & Delivery
steps.description: We deploy, monitor, and optimize your infrastructure. Continuous improvement is built into our process.

why_us.heading: Why Choose Cloudzy.AI
why_us.subtitle: 8+ years of delivering cloud excellence across three continents.

items.title: 8+ Years of Expertise
items.description: Battle-tested infrastructure solutions refined over nearly a decade of serving global clients.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Automated provisioning, scaling, and monitoring. Your infrastructure adapts in real-time to demand.

items.title: Intuitive Interface
items.description: A well-organized control panel that makes complex cloud management feel effortless.

items.title: Global Infrastructure
items.description: 13 data center locations across 3 continents. Low-latency access wherever your users are.

items.question: What is Cloudzy.AI?
items.answer: Cloudzy.AI is the enterprise division of the Cloudzy group, offering managed cloud infrastructure, DevOps services, and MLOps solutions to businesses of all sizes.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We provide Public Cloud, Private Cloud, DevOps as a Service, Data Center Services, and MLOps — all backed by our global infrastructure spanning 13 locations.

items.question: Who is Cloudzy.AI for?
items.answer: Our services are designed for businesses, developers, and IT professionals who need reliable, scalable, and cost-effective cloud infrastructure.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply reach out through our contact page or click 'Get Started' to submit your requirements. Our solution architects will get back to you within 24 hours.

items.question: Where are your data centers?
items.answer: We operate in 13 locations: Ogden, Dallas, Los Angeles, New York, Miami, Las Vegas (US), London (UK), Amsterdam (NL), Frankfurt (DE), Bern (CH), Dubai (AE), Singapore (SG), and Sydney (AU).

cta.heading: Ready to Embark on a Successful Partnership?
cta.subtitle: Let's build something extraordinary together.

contact.page_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out and let's discuss how we can help.
contact.address: Office No. B20, Khaled Mohammed Building, Horalanz, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
contact.services_list: Public Cloud, Private Cloud, DevOps as a Service, Datacenter Services, MLOps

footer.description: Cloudzy.AI is the enterprise cloud division of the Cloudzy group, delivering managed infrastructure solutions globally.
